title: YAS ISLAND ABU DHABI
content: Located on the golden shores of Abu Dhabi - just 20 minutes from downtown Abu Dhabi and 50 minutes from Dubai, Yas Island offers holidaymakers a diverse mix of leisure and entertainment experiences. From award-winning theme parks such as Ferrari World™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi; Yas Waterworld Yas Island, Abu Dhabi; Warner Bros. World™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi, and SeaWorld® Yas Island, Abu Dhabi to incredible attractions such as the record-breaking CLYMB™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi, and the thrilling Yas Marina Circuit.

title: DESERT ADVENTURES TOURISM
content: For over 25 years, Desert Adventures has been a premier DMC partner to tour operators worldwide, by offering superior destination solutions for FIT, VIP, and Leisure Group travel in the Middle East. Moreover, we work closely with Abu Dhabi’s Tourism board to develop comprehensive tourism products for the destination.

title: DESERT GATE TOURISM
content: Desert Gate Tourism began as a visionary dream in 2004, founded on professionalism, deep industry expertise, and a passion for creating unforgettable guest experiences. From a ground-handling service for tour operators, we have grown into a premier Destination Management Company across six destinations: UAE, Oman, Qatar, Maldives, Mauritius, and Sri Lanka. Our portfolio features bespoke hotel bookings, elevated transfers, curated excursions, MICE services, and sports experiences. At Desert Gate Tourism, we deliver experiences that go beyond the ordinary, connect people, and transform journeys.

title: ELEVATE DMC
content: Elevate DMC is a multi award-winning destination management company and a proud member of the Virtuoso and Serandipians networks, delivering seamless ground services and bespoke travel solutions across the Middle East, Indian Ocean, Southeast Asia, and beyond. Trusted by leading tour operators worldwide, Elevate DMC provides expert hotel contracting, competitive offers, luxury transportation, curated experiences, and personalised meet and assist services, supported by multilingual teams, advanced technology, and strong local partnerships to ensure reliable, refined service.

title:
ARABIAN EXPLORERS
A BRAND OF RAYNA GROUP
content: Arabian Explorers is a leading destination management company offering bespoke travel experiences across the Middle East. With over 15 years of expertise, we provide customized itineraries for cultural, adventure, and luxury travel in the UAE, Oman, and beyond. We focus on exceptional service, seamless logistics, and insider knowledge, ensuring unforgettable journeys. Partner with us to offer your clients unique, high-quality travel experiences that go beyond expectations. Let’s create memorable adventures together!

title: ABU DHABI PASS
content: The Abu Dhabi Pass is the City’s Official Sightseeing Pass, offering travelers seamless access to top attractions and exclusive savings across the capital. The Platform also serves as the B2B ticket distribution platform for travel trade partners and DMCs, offering seamless wholesale access to 70+ top attractions and experiences, with exclusive freebies like eSIM, FnB discounts, Shopping Offers &more — all through a single self-service portal via a single contract. Partners enjoy exclusive rates, zero bulk sales commitments and no Forex Fees.

title: AL AIN AND AL DHAFRA REGIONS
content:
In the heart of the UAE, Abu Dhabi’s Al Ain Region offers a journey through time, where heritage meets nature. Under the Department of Culture and Tourism – Abu Dhabi, Experience Al Ain showcases UNESCO-listed oases, majestic forts, museums, and vibrant local culture. Visitors are invited to discover authentic Emirati traditions, adventure, and warm hospitality within the UAE’s cultural heartland.

Al Dhafra Region is the vast western expanse within the Emirate of Abu Dhabi where life unfolds across open desert, quiet coastlines and landscapes shaped by nature and tradition. As the largest region in the emirate, it offers unhurried exploration and diverse experiences—from towering sand dunes in the Liwa Desert and wildlife encounters on Sir Bani Yas Island to historic forts and tranquil islands. The region’s living heritage and relaxed pace make it a unique destination for those seeking space, calm, and new discoveries beyond the city.

title:
VENUE WISE
AI-POWERED VENUE MARKETPLACE
content:
Venue Wise redefines venue discovery and event booking through AI. Our smart matchmaking engine connects event organizers and corporate bookers with the most suitable venues, eliminating guesswork and saving time.

For venues and vendors, we deliver data-enriched, qualified leads through structured profiles and intelligent scoring, turning event search into measurable booking outcomes.

title: QASR AL WATAN
content: Qasr Al Watan is a working Presidential palace in Abu Dhabi and a majestic cultural landmark that invites you to discover the rich legacy of knowledge and tradition that has shaped the UAE's journey. More than just a traditional palace, Qasr Al Watan boosts cultural understanding of the nation and emphasizes its incredible history. The palace stands as an icon of Abu Dhabi's skyline with a design exquisitely crafted to tribute to its Arabian heritage and artistry. You will feel the grandeur as you enter the grounds, and the structure and open halls echo its significance in Emirati culture.

title:
RIXOS PREMIUM
SAADIYAT ISLAND
content: Escape to Rixos Premium Saadiyat Island, a luxurious all-inclusive retreat in Abu Dhabi. Nestled on pristine Saadiyat Island, the resort offers crystal-clear Arabian Sea views, exceptional service, and world-class amenities. Guests enjoy a rich culinary journey across acclaimed restaurants and unwind with refreshing drinks at elegant bars and lounges—poolside, beachside, or indoors. It's the perfect blend of relaxation, indulgence, and natural beauty.

title: SHARAF TOURS LLC
content: Sharaf Tours is a UAE-based destination management company delivering end-to-end travel solutions across the UAE, Oman, Qatar, and Bahrain. Services include leisure and bespoke holiday programs, MICE and corporate events, cruise liner ground handling, and comprehensive group logistics. Trusted by international partners for reliable execution and regional expertise.

title: HOLIDAY INN ABU DHABI
content: Holiday Inn® Abu Dhabi offers business and leisure travelers dependability, friendly services and modern, attractive facilities at an excellent value in a convenient location. We provide innovative comfort to guests, whether on business or leisure. We take great pride in our work, and our sincerest hope is that it makes each one of our customers happy. Our hotel uses the IHG® Green Engage system, an innovative online environmental sustainability system that gives our hotel the means to manage our impact on the environment.

title: SAADIYAT CULTURAL DISTRICT
content: Saadiyat Cultural District Abu Dhabi is a unique constellation of museums, cultural institutions, collections and public programming that celebrate the achievements of the United Arab Emirates, the region and the world. Saadiyat Cultural District is a centre for innovation and creativity, research and knowledge and a place to encounter. Offering one of the highest concentrations of cultural experiences, Saadiyat Cultural District is the home of Zayed National Museum, Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi, Louvre Abu Dhabi, teamLab Phenomena Abu Dhabi and the future home of Guggenheim Abu Dhabi.

title:
CONRAD ABU DHABI
ETIHAD TOWERS
content: Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers is a luxury urban resort and culinary destination, home to over 12 world-class dining venues, a luxurious spa with 13 treatment rooms, a private beach, three swimming pools, and the Observation Deck at 300, offering breathtaking 360-degree views of the city from the 74th floor. Stay inspired in its 576 elegant rooms, suites, and residences, all with spectacular views of the Arabian Gulf. The resort is just minutes from the Presidential Palace, setting the standard for luxury hospitality and extraordinary experiences.

title:
MASARRA DESTINATION
MANAGEMENT COMPANY
content: Masarra is a full-service Destination Management Company focused on curating a unique portfolio of experiences in Abu Dhabi and the UAE. With a team of destination experts passionate about the region’s offerings, we specialise in creating tailored destination experiences, MICE offerings, and adventure activities that leave lasting impressions.

title:
TEAMLAB PHENOMENA
ABU DHABI
content:
TeamLab Phenomena Abu Dhabi showcases groundbreaking artworks by the international art collective teamLab. The installations are inspired by the balance between nature, the manufactured world, and the environment.

These living, evolving creations are shaped not only by natural forces but also by your interaction and engagement. Immerse yourself in these artworks and become one with the environment.

Situated in Saadiyat Cultural District, Abu Dhabi. It offers you a mind-blowing expedition that is different for each visitor and changes every time you visit.

title: ABU DHABI AIRPORTS
content:
Zayed International Airport (AUH), is the airport of the future, poised to welcome up to 45 million passengers annually and up to 11,000 passengers per hour, with a world first, nine biometric touchpoints by 2025, a journey that is set to transform the way we travel, forever.

The airport houses one of the largest environmental art pieces in the region, emphasizing the importance of passenger well-being, speed of kerb-to-gate journey and an array of retail, F&B and in-airport hotel options that ensures passengers travel relaxed and rejuvenated.

title: TRAVCO LLC
content: With over 25 years of experience TRAVCO has evolved as one of the leading DMC’s in the Gulf with operations in UAE, Oman & Qatar. TRAVCO offers a wide range of in destination services with dedicated staff specializing in developing bespoke programs and itineraries to suit client’s requirements from individual travelers, leisure groups to large MICE business.

title: W ABU DHABI YAS ISLAND
content: From sunrise treats to sunset rituals, discover an electrifying island escape at W Abu Dhabi – Yas Island, the world’s only hotel built on top of a legendary racetrack. Featuring 499 stylish rooms and suites with stunning track and marina views, every stay is designed to thrill. Indulge in bold flavours at Garage, Brooklyn Chop House and Pappas Taverna, sip handcrafted cocktails at W Lounge, unwind at WET Deck or recharge at AWAY Spa. With vibrant event spaces, FIT gym access and Yas Island’s iconic theme parks just minutes away, this is luxury with an edge.

title: SURPRISE TOURISM LLC
content: Surprise Tourism LLC is a premier Destination Management Company (DMC) based in the UAE, specializing in inbound and outbound travel across destinations worldwide. As one of the top 5 tour operators in the UAE, we are committed to delivering exceptional travel experiences that blend luxury, adventure, and cultural immersion. With a deep understanding of global destinations and strong industry partnerships, we offer tailor-made travel solutions for individual travelers, groups, and corporate clients. Whether it’s exploring iconic landmarks, indulging in luxury getaways, or experiencing rich cultural heritage, our expert team ensures seamless and unforgettable journeys.

title:
INTERCONTINENTAL
HOTEL & RESIDENCES
content:
InterContinental Hotel Abu Dhabi is a unique urban luxury resort. An icon of heritage and culture, opened by His Highness the late Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Al Nahyan. The hotels offer an unparalleled stay, experience of history, award winning dining options and comprehensive leisure facilities in an oasis of calm right in the heart of Abu Dhabi. All 390 rooms and suites offer sea or garden views.

Club InterContinental Hotel offers a higher level of luxury and exclusivity. The private Club Lounge overlooks the city and the coastline from the 18th floor with its outdoor terrace offering 360-degree views.

title: ADNH
content: Abu Dhabi National Hotels (ADNH) is a leading hospitality group managing a portfolio of premier properties: Sheraton Abu Dhabi Hotel & Resort, Le Méridien Abu Dhabi Resort, Radisson Blu Hotel & Resort, Abu Dhabi Corniche, and Radisson Blu Hotel & Resort, Al Ain. Combining world-class service with local culture, our hotels offer exceptional stays, dining, and events. ADNH is committed to excellence, innovation, and sustainability, creating memorable experiences that reflect the vibrant spirit of Abu Dhabi and the UAE.

title: RIXOS MARINA ABU DHABI
content: Rixos Marina Abu Dhabi is an iconic landmark, blending the best of Arabic and Turkish culture, dining, and hospitality. The resort’s sophisticated design, drawing inspiration from aquatic and Arabesque influences, tells the story of Abu Dhabi. Rixos Marina Abu Dhabi dares to elevate the guest experience, offering world-class gastronomy and entertainment. The hotel’s unique Multi-Board Experience caters to all travelers, allowing the freedom to explore endless possibilities through various cuisines, vibrant entertainment, and thrilling activities, designed to enrich every moment.

title:
BAB AL QASR
HOTEL & RESIDENCES
content: BAB AL QASR, meaning “door of the palace,” reflects its heritage through a striking Arabic doorway and gleaming copper-toned architecture. Inspired by Arabian culture, the hotel features Bedouin-style accents, Islamic geometric patterns, and a palm-filled lobby with a falaj-inspired water feature. This five-star hotel is located on the west end of Abu Dhabi and opened in late 2016. It is 38 km from Abu Dhabi International Airport and 90 minutes from Dubai. Bab Al Qasr offers 412 hotel rooms and suites and 265 serviced residences with luxurious modern design and stunning views of the Presidential Palace, Corniche, and Arabian Gulf.

title: THE ABU DHABI EDITION
content: The ABU DHABI EDITION brings the only luxury lifestyle hotel to the region. A contemporary and trend-setting hotel, with a unique hospitality concept. The ABU DHABI EDITION will be host to spectacular and eye-catching designs in the heart of Abu Dhabi. Locally groundbreaking dining and bar concepts, state-of-the-art meeting venues, and recreational facilities to keep all guests pampered or occupied in beautiful yet fuss-free surroundings. Guest engagement is seamless and interactive through a passionate service philosophy. The experience will carry through our sophisticated yet stimulating designs which will create an overall magical and lasting experience.

title: YAS PLAZA HOTELS
content: Across the heart of Yas Island, six hotels come together to create stays that feel personal, meaningful, and unhurried, with theme park access included in every stay. Each hotel has its own atmosphere, from calm and grounding to bold and lively, giving every guest space that suits their pace and purpose. From sea breeze mornings to adventure filled days and vibrant evenings, Yas Plaza Hotels is where experiences unfold naturally. Nothing feels forced. Everything feels easy. Moments linger long after you leave.

title: EXPERIENCE ABU DHABI
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.

title: ERTH ABU DHABI
content: Inspired by UAE Heritage, Erth remains committed to providing guests with unique memorable experiences whilst strengthening the property’s reputation as a leader in traditional Emirati hospitality. From our brand mark to the quality of our services and facilities, Erth is continually inspired by aspects of our rich cultural heritage.

title: ODYSSEY
content:
With over 42 years of industry expertise, we are a Destination Management Company (DMC) built on excellence, precision, and global reach. Since our inception in 1983, we’ve evolved into a trusted name in destination management with a presence spanning 140+ offices across 80+ countries, all coordinated from our global headquarters in Dubai.

We specialize in more than just travel — we deliver custom-designed, scalable, and cost-effective solutions for corporate clients, MICE programs, and institutional groups. From logistics and local operations to experiential programming and event management, we ensure every detail is executed with purpose and professionalism.

title: PARK HYATT ABU DHABI HOTEL AND VILLAS
content: Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel and Villas are the luxury haven of choice for discerning travelers on Saadiyat Island—where understated sophistication meets authentic Arabian hospitality. Tailored for global travelers, affluent leaders, and leisure seekers, the resort offers a distinctive blend of tranquility, cultural richness, and personalized service. From expansive beachfront villas and immersive wellness offerings to award-winning dining, every touchpoint reflects unparalleled excellence. More than a destination, Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi embodies refined hospitality through thoughtful details and a home away from home experience that ensures a seamless, memorable stay.

title: EXPERIENCE ABU DHABI
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.

title: EXPERIENCE ABU DHABI
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.

title: ROTANA
content:
Rotana is one of the region’s leading hospitality companies, founded in Abu Dhabi in 1992. It manages a portfolio of over 120 properties in operation and under development across six distinctthe Middle East, Africa, Eastern Europe, and Turkiye. Known for its commitment to quality and guest satisfaction, Rotana operates six distinct brands.

Rotana is part of the GHA DISCOVERY loyalty program offering guests exclusive benefits at more than 950 hotels in 100 countries.

With its brand promise of ‘Treasured Time’, Rotana continues to expand its presence across key markets. For more information, visit rotana.com

title: TOURISM365
content: Tourism365, the tourism arm of ADNEC Group, leads Abu Dhabi’s tourism industry by creating unforgettable travel experiences. With a vision to be a top travel organization in the MENA region, we connect travelers with unique destinations. Operating as a Destination Management Company (DMC) in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and Jordan, we also offer corporate travel solutions through our Travel Management Company (TMC). Our tour operator brands, Capital Holidays and Etihad Holidays, serve clients in the UAE, UK, and Germany, catering to a wide range of travel needs, from budget to luxury.

title: ETIHAD AIRWAYS
content: Etihad Airways, the national airline of the UAE, was formed in 2003 and quickly went on to become one of the world’s leading airlines. From its home in Abu Dhabi, Etihad flies to passenger and cargo destinations in the Middle East, Africa, Europe, Asia, Australia, and North America. Together with Etihad’s codeshare partners, Etihad’s network offers access to hundreds of international destinations. In recent years, Etihad has received numerous awards for its superior service and products, cargo offering, loyalty programme and more. To learn more, visit etihad.com

title: ZAYED NATIONAL MUSEUM
content: The ABU DHABI EDITION brings the only luxury lifestyle hotel to the region. A contemporary and trend-setting hotel, with a unique hospitality concept. The ABU DHABI EDITION will be host to spectacular and eye-catching designs in the heart of Abu Dhabi. Locally groundbreaking dining and bar concepts, state-of-the-art meeting venues, and recreational facilities to keep all guests pampered or occupied in beautiful yet fuss-free surroundings. Guest engagement is seamless and interactive through a passionate service philosophy. The experience will carry through our sophisticated yet stimulating designs which will create an overall magical and lasting experience

title: ABU DHABI ROYAL EQUESTRIAN ACADEMY
content:
Abu Dhabi Royal Equestrian Arts (ADREA) is the world’s fifth school of classical horsemanship and the first to rise beyond Europe. Rooted in the Arab world’s centuries-old tradition of Furusiyya, ADREA represents heritage, discipline and artistry.

At its heart are equestrian performances, the preservation of knowledge and immersive learning experiences that reflect the bond between horse and rider.

ADREA offers programmes from foundational training to advanced degrees in classical horsemanship. It is home to the Furusiyya Gallery, an all-equestrian Library, a saddle-making atelier and more.
